name: Hannibal Buress
bio: Hannibal Buress is an American comedian, actor, and writer known for a laid-back, conversational delivery. He wrote for Saturday Night Live and 30 Rock and appeared on The Eric Andre Show and Broad City. A 2014 stand-up routine of his renewed public attention to the sexual assault allegations against Bill Cosby.

timeline.ev: Starts performing comedy while at Southern Illinois University
Joins Saturday Night Live as a writer
Comedy Central special Animal Furnace airs
Onstage Cosby routine reignites public scrutiny of the allegations
Begins recurring role on Broad City

accolades: Wrote for Saturday Night Live and 30 Rock
Starred on Adult Swims The Eric Andre Show
Released the album My Name is Hannibal

bits.t: The Weirdest Part of Working in an Office
